who: small medical clinics processing 5–15 insurance claims/month
offer: For small medical clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual billing causes cash flow gaps. We automate the claims submission instead of manual billing and claims submission.
problem: manual billing processes lead to delayed insurance claims
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small medical clinics
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM outreach to small clinics with demo video
Participate in community forums for medical billing tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for claim entry and reporting
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for follow-ups
Allow CSV import for existing patient data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
